app.name: Bili-ShadowReplay
app.one_liner: A tool for caching Bilibili live streams and enabling real-time editing and minute-level publishing of clips.

screens.name: Main Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display cached live streams and provide access to clipping and publishing workflows.

screens.name: Recording Settings
screens.purpose: Configure recording options including platform, resolution, and automation preferences.

screens.name: Stream Preview
screens.purpose: Preview cached or live stream segments before clipping.

rust_commands.name: generate_clip
rust_commands.purpose: Generate a video clip from selected time intervals of a cached stream.

rust_commands.name: publish_to_bilibili
rust_commands.purpose: Upload and publish a generated clip to Bilibili with provided metadata.

rust_commands.name: record_stream
rust_commands.purpose: Initiate or manage live stream recording for supported platforms.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build basic clip selection UI
week 1: Implement core stream caching mechanism
acceptance_tests: Kuaishou and TikTok streams can be recorded and cached like Bilibili streams.
Multi-segment clips apply user-selected transitions during generation.
Safari browser displays stream preview controls without overlapping UI elements.
User can generate a clip from a cached Bilibili stream without errors in Docker environment.
